message:
feat(pt-core): implement config show and check commands (tiw6)

- Add `config show` command to display current configuration sources
- Add `check` command for validating priors, policy, and capabilities
- Shows whether defaults are being used when no config files found
- Rename CheckArgs.capabilities to check_capabilities (avoid clap conflict)
- Support all output formats (json, markdown, summary)

Part of golden path default behavior (process_triage-tiw6).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
